title: rosa cinnamomea var. davurica
intro: Rosa cinnamomea var. davurica, also known as Korean cinnamon rose or Rosa davurica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and antiseptic. The health benefits of Rosa cinnamomea var. davurica include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions and wounds. Rosa cinnamomea var. davurica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
